results.title: [Peptic ulcer in patients with neurotic and affective disorders: comorbidity, clinicoendoscopic and psychopathological features, approaches to therapy].
results.abstract: to study clinicoendoscopic and psychopathological relationships and the course of peptic ulcer (PU) in patients with neurotic and affective disorders and to evaluate the efficiency of psychopharmacotherapy, by applying a comprehensive approach to the treatment of comorbidies.
